## Privacy and safety check

- [ ] Does not add sensitive guest data fields
- [ ] Keeps first and last name handling intentional and minimal
- [ ] Keeps admin-only reset/settings controls protected

## Raspberry Pi check

- [ ] Avoids heavy frontend libraries
- [ ] Avoids heavy databases or background services
- [ ] Keeps the app usable on low-power hardware

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] Manual kiosk/dashboard/admin check if UI changed
